title: rosa × alpestris var. insularum
intro: Rosa × alpestris var. insularum, also known as the island alpine rose or alpine rose, is a rare and endangered subspecies of wild rose native to the Channel Islands of California. This fragrant, pink-flowering shrub has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rosa × alpestris var. insularum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rosa × alpestris var. insularum is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, where its medicinal properties can be harnessed to promote overall well-being.
